action.proof_term:
intro p e q a b N hp hba hfactor
calc
  p ∣ q ↔ p ^ (e + 1) ∣ a * N - b := by
    rw [hfactor, show e + 1 = e.succ by omega, Nat.pow_succ]
    exact (mul_dvd_mul_iff_left (pow_ne_zero e hp.ne_zero)).symm
  _ ↔ b ≡ a * N [MOD p ^ (e + 1)] :=
    (Nat.modEq_iff_dvd' hba).symm

intro p e q a b N hp hba hfactor
calc
  p ∣ q ↔ p ^ (e + 1) ∣ a * N - b := by
    rw [hfactor, show e + 1 = e.succ by omega, Nat.pow_succ]
    exact (mul_dvd_mul_iff_left (pow_ne_zero e hp.ne_zero)).symm
  _ ↔ b ≡ a * N [MOD p ^ (e + 1)] :=
    (Nat.modEq_iff_dvd' hba).symm

info.lean_statement: ∀ p e q a b N : ℕ, Nat.Prime p → b ≤ a * N → a * N - b = p ^ e * q → (p ∣ q ↔ b ≡ a * N [MOD p ^ (e + 1)])

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
